    def test_delete_user(self, driver):
    
        wait = WebDriverWait(driver, 15)
    
        # ------------------------------------
        # 1️⃣ Open Website
        # ------------------------------------
        driver.get("https://newsite-qa.matter.in/")
    
        matter_image = wait.until(
            EC.visibility_of_element_located((By.XPATH, "//img[@alt='Matter Black Logo']"))
        )
        assert matter_image.is_displayed(), "Matter logo not visible"
    
        # ------------------------------------
        # 2️⃣ Login UI Step (Generate OTP Session)
        # ------------------------------------
        driver.find_element(By.LINK_TEXT, "Login").click()
    
        phone_number = "9145496704"
    
        phone_field = wait.until(
            EC.visibility_of_element_located((By.NAME, "phone"))
        )
        phone_field.send_keys(phone_number)
    
        driver.find_element(By.XPATH, "//button[@type='submit']").click()
    
        # ------------------------------------
        # 3️⃣ Create requests session & attach browser cookies
        # ------------------------------------
        session = requests.Session()
    
        for cookie in driver.get_cookies():
            session.cookies.set(cookie['name'], cookie['value'])
    
        # ------------------------------------
        # 4️⃣ Validate OTP API (WITH SAME SESSION)
        # ------------------------------------
        validate_url = "https://orbitqa.matter.in/matter-auth/v1/auth/validate"
    
        validate_payload = {
            "phone": phone_number,
            "otp": "8319",   # Make sure this OTP is fresh
            "type": "LOGIN",
            "timeStamp": datetime.now().isoformat(),
            "verified": True
        }
    
        validate_headers = {
            "Content-Type": "application/json",
            "x-api": "552721c7ca971a196e73"
        }
    
        validate_response = session.post(
            validate_url,
            json=validate_payload,
            headers=validate_headers
        )
    
        print("Validate Status:", validate_response.status_code)
        print("Validate Response:", validate_response.text)
